heading: Distribution of assets on dissolution or final liquidation
label: 152312 Distribution of assets on dissolution or final liquidation
text: On dissolution or final liquidation of the corporation, any assets remaining after the discharge of all liabilities shall be used by the board of directors for the purposes stated in or be transferred to a recognized educational foundation.section 152302 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15231236:675., .Aug. 1, 1956, ch. 824, § 1570 Stat. 797The word “satisfaction” is omitted as included in “discharge”, and the word “obligations” is omitted as included in “liabilities”. The word “outstanding” is omitted as unnecessary.
